name: Cencora, Inc.
business: Cencora is one of the largest global pharmaceutical sourcing and distribution services companies. It distributes a comprehensive offering of brand-name, specialty brand-name, and generic pharmaceuticals, over-the-counter healthcare products, home healthcare supplies and equipment, and related services to healthcare providers in the United States and select global markets. Additionally, it furnishes healthcare providers and pharmaceutical manufacturers with related services including data analytics, outcomes research, reimbursement and pharmaceutical consulting services, niche premium logistics services, inventory management, pharmacy automation, pharmacy management, and packaging solutions.
sellsTo: acute care hospitals and health systems
long-term care and alternate site pharmacies

exposures.sentence: Additionally, we furnish healthcare providers and pharmaceutical manufacturers with an assortment of related services, including data analytics, outcomes research, reimbursement and pharmaceutical consulting services (including regulatory affairs, development consulting and scientific affairs, pharmacovigilance, and quality management and compliance) niche premium logistics services, inventory management, pharmacy automation, pharmacy management, and packaging solutions.

Additionally, we continue to improve our entity-wide infrastructure environment to drive efficiency, capabilities, and speed to market, and we are seeking to use AI to improve our business operations, financial position, and results of operations.
We also continue to invest in cybersecurity capabilities as a key priority to improve and enhance our cyber resiliency.
We are well positioned to service and support biotechnology therapies and advanced technologies such as cell and gene therapies.
increased sales of products labeled for diabetes and/or weight loss in the GLP-1 class of $7.7 billion, or 26.9%.
It is a leading global specialty transportation and logistics provider for the biopharmaceutical industry.
Additionally, we furnish healthcare providers and pharmaceutical manufacturers with an assortment of related services, including data analytics
We continue to seek opportunities to achieve increased productivity and drive operating income gains as we invest in and continue to implement warehouse automation technology

catalysts.event: New reporting structure effective first quarter fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: Beginning in the first quarter of fiscal 2026, our reporting structure will be comprised of U.S. Healthcare Solutions, International Healthcare Solutions, and Other.

catalysts.event: Planned capital expenditures of approximately $900 million in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to spend approximately $900 million on capital expenditures during fiscal 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Pharmaceutical sales in the United States are expected to grow at a CAGR of approximately 8.4% from 2024 through 2029
tamClaims.sentence: Pharmaceutical sales in the United States, as recently estimated by IQVIA, an independent third-party provider of information to the pharmaceutical and healthcare industry, are expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of approximately 8.4% from 2024 through 2029, and the growth rate is dependent, in part, on pharmaceutical manufacturer price increases.

tamClaims.claim: Generic pharmaceuticals currently account for approximately 90% of the prescription volume in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Generic pharmaceuticals currently account for approximately 90% of the prescription volume in the U.S.
